summary: Lewis Hamilton's arrival at Ferrari injects fresh momentum into the Scuderia's title charge, as the seven-time champion seeks to capitalize on his commanding Spain victory against a resurgent McLaren outfit hungry to close the gap. Charles Leclerc faces the critical task of matching his new teammate's confidence while Ferrari juggles strategic pit-stop calls and tire management on Spa's unpredictable weather stage. A strong result here could cement Ferrari's comeback narrative and narrow the points deficit, transforming the championship battle from a two-horse race into a genuine three-way war heading into the season's second half.
